baskin-theater-arts.name: Jack Baskin Engineering / Theater Arts
baskin-theater-arts.landmarks: Jack Baskin Engineering is on Science Hill near the Hagar Dr entrance. Theater Arts (DNCE 100) is near Porter College off Empire Grade Rd.

classroom-unit.name: Classroom Unit
classroom-unit.landmarks: Central Campus near Hahn Student Services and the Bay Tree Bookstore. The three Classroom Unit buildings are along the main campus walkway between McHenry Library and the Quarry Plaza.

college-9-social-sciences.name: Colleges Nine & Ten / Social Sciences
college-9-social-sciences.landmarks: Upper campus near the Social Sciences buildings. Access via McLaughlin Dr or the campus loop road. Adjacent to the College Nine and John R. Lewis College dining hall.

cowell-college.name: Cowell College
cowell-college.landmarks: Lower campus near the main entrance. Adjacent to Stevenson College. Walk uphill from the main campus entrance on Bay Dr. Near the Cowell & Stevenson Dining Hall.

crown-college.name: Crown College
crown-college.landmarks: Upper campus past Science Hill. Adjacent to Merrill College. Access via Heller Dr. Near the Crown & Merrill Dining Hall. Uphill from McHenry Library.

engineering.name: Engineering 2
engineering.landmarks: On Science Hill next to Jack Baskin Engineering. Access via Hagar Dr or McLaughlin Dr. The building is behind Baskin Engineering, closer to the campus loop road.

humanities.name: Humanities Building
humanities.landmarks: Central campus near Quarry Plaza and the Cowell/Stevenson area. Walk past the Quarry Amphitheater from the main road. Adjacent to the Communications Building.

johnrlewis-socialsciences.name: John R. Lewis College / Social Sciences
johnrlewis-socialsciences.landmarks: Upper campus near the Social Sciences buildings. Same area as Colleges Nine & Ten. Access via McLaughlin Dr. Near the John R. Lewis & College Nine Dining Hall.

kresge-college.name: Kresge College
kresge-college.landmarks: West side of campus near Porter College. Access via Empire Grade Rd or the campus loop road. Known for its distinctive village-style architecture. Near Porter & Kresge Dining Hall.

mchenry-library.name: McHenry Library
mchenry-library.landmarks: Heart of central campus. The main library building is easily visible from most directions. Between Science Hill and the Colleges. Multiple entrances on ground and upper levels.

merrill-college.name: Merrill College
merrill-college.landmarks: Upper campus adjacent to Crown College. Access via Heller Dr. Near the Crown & Merrill Dining Hall. The cultural center is a notable landmark nearby.

oakes-college.name: Oakes College
oakes-college.landmarks: West side of upper campus. Access via Empire Grade Rd. Adjacent to Rachel Carson College. Near the Rachel Carson & Oakes Dining Hall. Close to the campus western entrance.

porter-college.name: Porter College
porter-college.landmarks: West side of campus near Kresge College. Access via Empire Grade Rd. Known for its art studios and murals. Near Porter & Kresge Dining Hall. The Porter Sinsheimer Labs are nearby.

rachel-carson-college.name: Rachel Carson College
rachel-carson-college.landmarks: West side of upper campus next to Oakes College. Access via Empire Grade Rd. Near the Rachel Carson & Oakes Dining Hall. Previously known as College Eight.

science-hill.name: Science Hill
science-hill.landmarks: Cluster of science buildings including Physical Sciences, Natural Sciences Annex, Thimann Labs, and Earth & Marine Sciences. Central to campus, accessible from Hagar Dr. Between McHenry Library and the Engineering buildings.

stevenson-college.name: Stevenson College
stevenson-college.landmarks: Lower campus adjacent to Cowell College. Near the main campus entrance. Walk uphill from Bay Dr. Near the Cowell & Stevenson Dining Hall. The Stevenson fireside lounge is a popular study spot.
